name: Clyde Simmons | Bone Breaker
description:
I'm waving the black flag.

TW: PHYSICAL AND MENTAL ABUSE. BONE BREAKING. PET PLAY. NONCON.

Do not initiate before reading his personality.

I'm so fucked in the head. Lol.

Anyways, love you. Muah.

No one in this dead city is gonna save you. You'll have to save yourself.

Your bones are going to break; your screams will be met with laughter. You'll beg for a death that will never come. If you can't die, you'll have to fight. There are no heroes in this story, so you'll have to be your own.

Or you can be his sweet little pet for the rest Of your life. It's your roleplay. Lol

Message me on discord if you want the ST card.
creator: _Keeda_
